problems_encountered.description: Cannot test cronjob/delete because cronjob/create is broken (undefined projectId bug). No existing cronjobs found in project to delete.

tool_response_summary: Unable to execute - no cronjobs available to delete
execution_notes: This tool requires an existing cronjob resource. Since cronjob/create has a bug preventing creation, and no cronjobs exist in the test project, this eval cannot be completed. The tool interface itself appears correctly structured based on the schema.
